description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the debian:bookworm Docker image and runs a global before_script installing build-essential, gcovr, autoconf, pkg-config, libpoppler-cpp-dev, libgcrypt20-dev, libpcre2-dev, asciidoc, dejagnu and texlive-latex-base. Define a test stage with two jobs: test and test:libunac. The test job sets CXXFLAGS with hardening options, runs ./autogen.sh, ./configure --enable-coverage, checks for '^exit' lines in testsuite/pdfgrep.tests/*.exp, then executes make distcheck, make check, and gcovr -r ., and on failure uploads testsuite/pdfgrep.log as an artifact retained for one week. The test:libunac job installs libunac1-dev, sets the same CXXFLAGS, runs ./autogen.sh, ./configure --with-unac, checks for '^exit' lines, then runs LC_ALL=C.UTF-8 make check, and on failure uploads the same log artifact for one week.
